components.name: Backend FastAPI Service
components.description: Provides endpoints for retrieving events, status, and health checks.
components.suggested_spec: Implement a robust FastAPI backend with Pydantic models for event data and CRUD operations.

components.name: Jules AI Integration Client
components.description: Core client for interacting with the Jules API (v1alpha) for multi-agent support.
components.suggested_spec: Develop a Python client to wrap Jules API endpoints for session management and activity tracking.

components.name: Event Scraping Engine
components.description: Handles web scraping from various sources using CloakBrowser and Jina Reader fallbacks.
components.suggested_spec: Create modular scrapers that utilize stealth browsers and AI-driven content extraction.

components.name: Autonomous Repair & Validation System
components.description: Analyzes failures, generates improved scraper code using Jules AI, and applies fixes automatically.
components.suggested_spec: Implement an autonomous loop that detects scraping failures and uses LLMs to self-correct the codebase.

components.name: Workflow Orchestration & Deployment
components.description: Orchestrates the weekly scraping runs and manages the deployment of results to GitHub Pages.
components.suggested_spec: Automate the end-to-end data pipeline from scraping to static site generation and deployment.
